summary: Iteration 36 - Minor Protection (Google Play Compliance) Testing Complete. All backend APIs and frontend UI components working correctly. Birth date field in registration, minor warning display, safety modal for minors, private message restrictions, and APK/AAB downloads all verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor protection implementation is solid - birth_date field properly stored and used for age calculation
Safety modal appears correctly for minors during registration with appropriate messaging
Private message endpoint properly blocks minors from chatting with non-friends (403 error)
APK/AAB download endpoints working correctly (files ~90MB and ~62MB respectively)
seed_data_creation: Created test users with minor birth dates during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Minor protection fully implemented: 1) Registration form has birth_date field with 'Data di nascita (AAAA-MM-GG)' placeholder, 2) Yellow warning appears for minors: 'Utente minore di 18 anni: alcune funzionalità richiederanno il consenso dei genitori', 3) Safety Modal appears before completing registration with title 'Promemoria Sicurezza Online' and 'Ho capito, continua' button, 4) API /api/safety/status returns is_minor:true for users under 18, 5) POST /api/private-messages returns 403 if minor tries to message non-friend, 6) APK download at /api/download/apk (90MB), AAB at /api/download/aab (62MB)

features_tested.registration_birth_date_field: PASS - Field present with placeholder 'Data di nascita (AAAA-MM-GG)'
features_tested.minor_warning_display: PASS - Yellow warning appears when entering birth date of minor (2015-05-15)
features_tested.safety_modal_for_minors: PASS - Modal 'Promemoria Sicurezza Online' appears with safety tips and 'Ho capito, continua' button
features_tested.api_safety_status: PASS - Returns is_minor:true for users with recent birth_date
features_tested.api_private_messages_minor_blocked: PASS - Returns 403 when minor tries to chat with non-friend
features_tested.registration_with_birth_date: PASS - New users can register with birth_date field

frontend_verification.minor_warning: Verified yellow warning box appears for minors
frontend_verification.safety_modal: Verified modal appears with correct content and button
